faq_1: What types of photography do you specialize in?
faq_1_ans: At Ali1_Visuals, we specialize in automotive, nature, sports, and portrait photography. Whether you're looking to capture dynamic action shots, your dream car, or timeless portraits, we've got you covered.
faq_2: How can I book a shoot?
faq_2_ans: You can book a session by visiting the Contact page or messaging us directly through Instagram @Ali1_Visuals. Please include the type of shoot, location, and preferred dates.
faq_3_ans: Pricing varies based on the type and duration of the shoot. Custom packages are available to fit different needs and budgets. Get in touch for a personalized quote!
faq_4: Where are you based, and do you travel for shoots?
faq_4_ans: Ali1_Visuals is based in Illinois and Indiana. We’re also open to traveling for shoots across the Midwest and beyond—just reach out and we’ll work something out!
faq_5_ans: Generally, we deliver only the final edited images to maintain quality standards. However, raw files may be available upon special request with an additional fee.
